semantic.role: Barrel module aggregating and re-exporting the fix service's public API for external consumers.
responsibilities: Re-export the FixService class for use by other modules.
Re-export the runFix function for direct invocation of fix workflows.
Re-export the FixRunSummary type for type-safe consumption of fix results.
Act as a single entry point for all fix-related functionality from the fix-service module.
outOfScope: Does not contain any fix logic or service orchestration.
Does not define any new symbols or behavior.
Does not handle CLI interaction or HTTP serving.
invariants: Must only re-export symbols from the fix-service module; no imports from CLI entrypoints or orchestration layers.
Must not introduce any side effects or initialization logic.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Provide a clean, centralized point of access to the fix subsystem, decoupling consumers from the internal path of the fix-service module.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: No specific change intent captured; the barrel pattern supports modularity and reusability.

publicSurface.description: Service class exposing methods to perform and manage automated fix operations on source code. Consumed by task runners and CLI commands.
Top-level function that executes a complete fix workflow, typically integrating analysis, patching, and validation. Invoked by task orchestrators or directly.
Type definition representing the result of a fix execution, including counts of applied, skipped, and failed fixes. Used for reporting and decision-making.
